overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player character crosses wide intersections with glowing yellow crosswalks, walks along sidewalks beneath elevated highways, and passes a police scene with NCPD officers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide futuristic intersection with yellow zebra crossing

events.description: begins walking forward across the wide yellow-striped crosswalk
reaches the opposite sidewalk and exits the open intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella walking alongside the player
futuristic black car driving through the intersection on the wet road

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red X markings on wet asphalt
tall illuminated skyscraper with glass facade rising above the intersection
large glowing billboard with purple and white illumination on building facade
multi-level highway overpass with orange structural supports and green neon trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic intersection at night, with the player standing on a yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon advertisements glow on surrounding glass towers while light rain creates reflections on the wet asphalt. The player walks forward across the intersection alongside other pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas, passing beneath the looming elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with palm trees

events.description: steps onto sidewalk and moves under the elevated highway structure
continues walking straight along the covered walkway passing palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing palm trees and opposing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow pants and jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement with yellow tactile paving strips along the edge
tall palm tree in concrete planter along the sidewalk edge
dark building facade illuminated by green neon signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the player moves onto a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure that blocks most of the sky. The area is sheltered from the rain but still illuminated by neon lights from nearby buildings. Palm trees line the walkway as the player passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, with the sound of traffic echoing from the road above.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and moving traffic

events.description: blue sports car with glowing elements drives past on the right side
slight adjustment to path to navigate around pedestrians with umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing various pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: sleek blue sports car with underglow driving past on the wet street
pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella walking ahead

entered.detail: multi-story building with large glass windows and illuminated storefronts
tall pole with horizontal fluorescent light fixture
green and yellow illuminated business sign above entrance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the sidewalk as the elevated highway moves to the left, revealing more of the neon-lit cityscape. Commercial buildings with glowing storefront signs line the street while various vehicles pass by on the wet road. Pedestrians with colorful illuminated umbrellas walk in both directions, and the player passes a sleek blue sports car driving along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with police activity and crosswalk

events.description: approaches police scene with NCPD vehicle and officers on the sidewalk
crosses the street near the parked police car at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a police incident scene with NCPD officers, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car with flashing blue lights parked on the sidewalk
police officer in blue uniform standing beside the patrol car

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing with red X markings at the intersection
tall black traffic light pole with illuminated green signal
commercial building with prominent red neon signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins as the player approaches a police scene where an NCPD vehicle with flashing blue lights is parked on the sidewalk. Police officers stand nearby as the player navigates around them and steps onto another yellow crosswalk to cross the street. The player continues across the wet intersection, passing other pedestrians while traffic waits at the green light, with towering futuristic buildings visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy, neon-lit metropolis, moving from a wide open intersection into the sheltered shadows of an overpass and back into the vibrant city streets. It begins on a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst glowing glass towers and pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas, moving forward beneath the looming structure of an elevated highway. As the camera transitions onto a concrete sidewalk, the sky is momentarily blocked by the massive highway overhead, creating a sheltered corridor lined with palm trees and echoing traffic. The scene then opens up as the highway shifts to the left, revealing a stretch of glowing storefronts and a sleek blue sports car gliding along the wet asphalt. Finally, the path leads toward a police scene marked by flashing blue lights and NCPD officers before the camera steps onto another yellow crosswalk, heading toward towering futuristic buildings in the distance.
